result_list=[]
result=False
accommodation_position=''
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation': accommodation_position=activity_position(activity)
result=(poi_distance(target_city(plan), 'Expo Culture Park', accommodation_position)<=5.23029572209799)
result_list.append(result)
result=True
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='accommodation' and room_type(activity)!=1: result=False
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: 1 person, departing from Suzhou, traveling to Shanghai for 3 days. Requirement: satisfy either of the following: 1. Accommodation within 5.24 km of Expo Culture Park; 2. Prefer a single bed room.
